situation: audit-2026-07-07-020 finding M-001: /ws/ in _EXEMPT_PREFIXES causes HTTP middleware to skip auth for WS upgrade requests. While existing WS handlers (/ws/live, /ws/audio) call verify_ws_token() and /ws/xiaozhi uses auth._check() internally, any future WS endpoint added without explicit auth would be silently unprotected. Defense-in-depth gap.
action: Removed /ws/ from _EXEMPT_PREFIXES. Updated auth_middleware and verify_http to detect /ws/ paths and extract token from query param ?token= instead of Authorization header. This provides defense-in-depth: middleware now validates WS upgrade requests before they reach handlers. Existing handlers retain their own auth checks (double-check pattern). Stacked on top of H-004 dev-mode fix in existing opt-auth-1783427422 worktree via direct wt edit (cp-guard escape hatch per MEMORY [[Stack on diverged wt escape hatch]]).
outcome_evidence: git commit 8b0d8c7 on auto/opt-auth-1783427422; pushed to origin successfully. Diff: 27 insertions, 7 deletions in auth.py. Three functions modified: _EXEMPT_PREFIXES tuple (removed /ws/), auth_middleware (added WS query-param token extraction), verify_http (same WS path handling). All existing WS handler auth checks remain intact as second layer.
next_suggestion: 派生 M-002 fix: web.py scraper User-Agent 改为合规 bot UA 或切换官方搜索 API
派生 M-006 fix: xiaozhi_server.py WS auth 重构为使用 auth.verify_ws_token() 消除重复实现

audit_findings.finding: /ws/ in _EXEMPT_PREFIXES exempts WS upgrade requests from HTTP middleware auth check. If a WS handler omits its own auth, the endpoint is silently unprotected. Defense-in-depth gap.
audit_findings.remediation: Remove /ws/ from exempt list; add WS-aware token extraction (query param) in middleware. Applied in this case.
